name: Cereal Yogurt Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. PREHEAT the oven to 350°F.
2. COMBINE cereal, 3/4 cup flour, sugar, and cinnamon in a small bowl.
3. CUT IN margarine until the mixture forms coarse crumbs.
4. PRESS half of the mixture firmly into the bottom of a greased 8-inch square pan.
5. MIX yogurt, egg, and 2 tablespoons flour in another small bowl.
6. SPREAD the yogurt mixture over the cereal mixture in the pan.
7. SPRINKLE with the remaining cereal mixture.
8. BAKE for 30 minutes or until golden brown. ALLOW to cool in the pan on a wire rack.
9. CUT into bars.
